text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh. My. GOSH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprised to hear a familiar voice, I go to
investigate what seems to be another problem...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: These are all amazing! You both took such great pictures! Really, wow!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, you're gonna make me blush,
exaggeratin' like that! But anyway, glad ya like
'em!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Part of the reason they came out cute is
because you're so cute!
choice_data_list: What are you three talking about?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Familiar! These two were just taking some
pics for me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grandma asked to see me in my signature
racewear, so I thought I'd send her a few
pictures! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Here, come take a look! Didn't they come out
incredible?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows me her camera roll, where there are a
ton of pictures of her in her signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Right?! They've captured my outfit right down to
the texture of the material and the smallest
decorations! They really caught my witchiness
too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
They both have a great eye! It's like these
pictures were taken with a time-stopping spell!

text_block_list.name: Vodka and Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It was nothing! ♪
Heh-heh... It was nothin'!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I know! Let's get some even better ones since
we're already at it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
More magical and more sparkly! I want them as
good as a movie poster!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ah... So, um... What would that look like, I
wonder...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Can amateurs even take those kinds of pictures? I
mean, we only have our phone cameras.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What the heck?! I just got done saying how good
you two are, and now you're saying you can't do
it?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I just know you can take even better pictures than these! So hop to it! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right, already! Fine! If you're gonna be like
that, then I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Good grief... Well, I am number one, so I'll just
have to show you that I'm the number-one
photographer too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Now we're talking! So, what kind of picture
should we take next?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Familiar! Help me brainstorm! What's a good
idea?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly put on the spot, I start to think...
Maybe a change of location would help.
choice_data_list: How about an artistic shot somewhere desolate?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I know a good place! It's a little far, but
follow me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My dad took me here on his motorcycle the other
day! What do you think? Isn't it cool?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's great! It's like a wasteland where the cool
witches hang out!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now that's a nice breeze! You look so cool
with your racewear blowing in the wind! Quick,
strike a pose!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Get one more to the side! Hurry! Before the
wind stops!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
How about this angle? Okay, I'm taking it...
Oh yes! You look very cool!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's great! You're getting it! Now get this
pose next!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wait, look at the reflector! The angle of light is
totally wrong! Do it right!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Being a genius magical girl is great and all,
but maybe I should call myself a lone-wolf genius
witch instead.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Look at the time. That took forever.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But we got some awesome pics out of it! Hehehe.
I think Grandma's gonna love them!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I know a great spot. It's been super
popular lately for Umastagram pictures.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This place is fantastic! It's so witchy! You really
know your stuff, Scarlet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I thought you'd like it. Shall we order some
of their best-looking desserts?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Mm-mm-mmm! That smells so good...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ah! That's a great smile! Perfect time for a
picture!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ouch! Geez, this is way too hot!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, stop! Don't move! Just point your face this
way!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You can still take pictures when I move, can't
you? Actually, can't you even take moving
pictures?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But more importantly... Your cake looks pretty
yummy, Familiar! Can I have a bite?
choice_data_list: Sure, just stay still for a second!
Sure, just stay still for a second!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Look at the time. That took forever.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But we got some awesome pics out of it! Hehehe.
I think Grandma's gonna love them!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
All three of you did just as I expected. Not bad,
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! And as the ultimate compliment, I'll be sure
to ask you all to help me again sometime. ♪
That's pretty special!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Phew! That was pretty rough.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's for sure. But... she looked so happy,
didn't she?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at the sinking sun, thinking to myself that I
know just how they feel.
